title: Bitter Ukrainian Ham Wrap
description: A unique fusion of Ukrainian and Western flavors, combining the bitterness of coffee with the savory taste of ham and the crunch of a wrap.
instructions: 1. Brew a cup of strong and dark Ukrainian coffee.
2. Slice 4 ounces of ham into thin strips.
3. Fill a large wrap with the ham, leaving room for the coffee.
4. Pour the brewed coffee over the ham, making sure to cover it evenly.
5. Top with a cup of aerated water to balance the bitterness.
6. Fold the wrap into a neat package and serve immediately.
